name: koide_bounded_replay_regression_sequence
description: Replays the 2026-06-12 bounded_degraded A/B regression at outdoor_hard_01a t=50-54s. Round-1 (no fitness cap): accepting fit 18.7/31.9 rows dragged the anchor (rot RMSE 1.8->6.1 deg). Round-2 (fit<=12 cap + budget-reset guard): even fit 6.3-8.7 bridging accepts diverged the run (tRMSE 6.80 m vs same-day baseline 0.216 m). Conclusion: no degraded accept is safe on this dataset; the checks only require that gross fits and the exhausted tail are rejected.
source: /tmp/lidarloc_koide_ab_bounded/alignment_status.csv rows 185-205 (run abcf172+bounded gate, tRMSE 0.618 vs baseline 0.582, ok rows 193 vs 329)
